page: Microsoft Azure NV18ads_A10_v5 is a GPU-accelerated virtual machine belonging to the NVADSA10v5 server family. It is built on an x86_64 AMD processor architecture and delivers 18 dedicated vCPUs managed via the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. The instance features a partitioned graphics accelerator, providing a 0.5 allocation of an NVIDIA A10 GPU with 11 GB of dedicated VRAM. This fractional GPU design offers a cost-effective alternative to full-GPU instances, allowing users to run accelerated workloads without paying for unused hardware capacity.

The server is equipped with 220.0 GB of system memory, which translates to a high resource density of 12.22 GB of RAM per vCPU. Storage is supported by a 737 GB local disk, and the instance is Premium Storage capable to accommodate demanding I/O requirements. It does not include complimentary public IPv4 addresses, requiring external network configuration for public access.

This hardware configuration is suited for workloads that require a balance of high memory capacity and moderate graphics acceleration. Typical deployment scenarios include virtual desktop infrastructure, 3D visualization, media encoding, and mid-range machine learning inference tasks.
description: Microsoft Azure NV18ads_A10_v5 is a GPU-accelerated virtual machine from the NVADSA10v5 family, featuring 18 dedicated AMD vCPUs on an x86_64 architecture. It is configured with 220.0 GB of system memory, a 737 GB local disk with Premium Storage capability, and a partitioned NVIDIA A10 GPU providing 11 GB of VRAM. This resource-dense profile delivers a cost-efficient balance of high memory and fractional GPU acceleration, making it suitable for virtual desktops, graphics rendering, and machine learning inference.
og_description: Microsoft Azure NV18ads_A10_v5 is an AMD-powered virtual machine featuring 18 dedicated vCPUs, 220 GB of RAM, a 737 GB local disk, and a fractional NVIDIA A10 GPU with 11 GB of VRAM.

tagline: A resource-dense virtual machine featuring partitioned graphics acceleration, high memory capacity, and dedicated AMD processors for professional workloads.

Fractional NVIDIA A10 GPU with 11 GB VRAM
737 GB local storage with Premium Storage support
Designed for virtual desktops, rendering, and inference
